textByHash.a7dc5b1d6062259af889796744012883f7c22416: Do not be afraid, my child, for you are not alone. Your voice will be one of thousands, singing an eternal silence.
textByHash.53f1e271173007951515b77408b0844e89febba0: Seek out our divine order in the cistern below. They will guide you across the waves.
textByHash.29eb16a1c528866dfc1499ef10419be05a694bc2: Go now, and keep our icon close, for it marks you as one of the chosen. Without it, you are forsaken.
textByHash.0162543d256853121de4778f7fc49142ea48115a: And so another voice joins the Silent Choir.
textByHash.38877ea9438a1e9ceb503963470eb1ebe81847d4: It matters not. The day of ascension approaches. His fear will be washed away by the endless sea...
